title: Chinese 3DCG Eva film
wikitext:
[]: Chinese 3DCG Eva film             Quote Post by cyharding » Mon Jun 29, 2020 7:15 pm Chinese director Somei Sun released his own Eva tribute film Evangelion: It Can (Not) be True. https://vimeo.com/433112136 Futher information about the work comes from this ANN article here. Personally, I like to think of it as a consolation prize for not getting the final movie this past weekend.

[]: Re: Chinese 3DCG Eva film             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Jun 30, 2020 2:29 am cyharding wrote: Personally, I like to think of it as a consolation prize for not getting the final movie this past weekend.

[]: Re: Chinese 3DCG Eva film             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Jul 01, 2020 3:01 pm I was just about to post this! Really well done.

[]: Re: Chinese 3DCG Eva film             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jul 01, 2020 7:21 pm That's REALLY hot. Kinda feels good to watch while we wait for Shin Eva.

[]: Re: Chinese 3DCG Eva film             Quote Post by Derantor » Wed Jul 01, 2020 9:36 pm Watching this I kinda warmed up to the idea of life action Eva again - only to realize that while it might look very good, it could never be done satisfactory.
summary:

Personally, I like to think of it as a consolation prize for not getting the final movie this past weekend.

Personally, I like to think of it as a consolation prize for not getting the final movie this past weekend.
